checkin.title: Progress Check-in
checkin.noMilestones: No upcoming milestones. Your plan is complete!

subtext.ahead: You're making faster progress than expected. Keep up the great work!
subtext.onTrack: Everything is going according to plan. Your consistency is paying off.
subtext.behind: You're a bit off from the target, but don't worry. Small adjustments will get you back.

checkin.summaryIntro: You aimed for {{target}} kcal/day, but averaged
checkin.notEnoughDataWarning: You have less than 4 weight logs this week. Averages may be less accurate.
checkin.notificationBody: Tap here to review your progress for the past week and update your plan.
